/* Generated by EPP 1.0beta3 (by lisp-epp1.0beta3) */

public class TestCallByReference {
  public static void main(String argv[]){
    int rest = 0; 
    int[] _T0 = {rest, }; 
    System.out.println((divide(10, 3, _T0)) == (3)); 
    rest = ((_T0)[0]); 
    System.out.println((rest) == (1)); 
    }
  
  static int divide(int x, int y, int[] rest){
    (rest)[0] = ((x) % (y)); 
    return (x) / (y); 
    }
  }
